steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage describes fossils of "two previously unknown species of prehistoric penguins" studied by paleontologists. The decisive clue is the phrase "prehistoric" and the context of analyzing fossil bones, which implies these species no longer exist.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice B directly aligns with the implication of the fossils being from species that are no longer living.

The passage does not mention their size comparison to modern penguins (see line about emperor penguins) or their habitat behavior.

A, C, and D either contradict or ignore the fossil/prehistoric context.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
